mapper.update: UPDATE items SET name=#{name},unit=#{unit},description=#{description},updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM items WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT * FROM items WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND name LIKE CONCAT(#{name},'%') ORDER BY updated_at DESC,id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE processes SET item_id=#{itemId},owner_user_id=#{ownerUserId},name=#{name},description=#{description},updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND status=1 AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE process_items SET deleted_at=NOW(),updated_at=NOW() WHERE process_id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM process_items WHERE process_id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY id
SELECT p.*,i.name item_name,i.unit item_unit FROM processes p JOIN items i ON i.id=p.item_id WHERE p.id=#{id} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT p.*,i.name item_name,i.unit item_unit FROM processes p JOIN items i ON i.id=p.item_id WHERE p.deleted_at IS NULL AND p.owner_user_id=#{ownerUserId}AND p.item_id=#{itemId}AND p.status=#{status} ORDER BY p.updated_at DESC,p.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE item_units SET stock_status=#{stockStatus},quality_status=#{qualityStatus},updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT u.*,i.name item_name FROM item_units u JOIN items i ON i.id=u.item_id WHERE u.id=#{id} AND u.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE inventory_flows SET from_user_id=#{fromUserId},to_user_id=#{toUserId},flow_type=#{flowType},name=#{name},description=#{description},updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND flow_status=1 AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE inventory_flow_items SET deleted_at=NOW(),updated_at=NOW() WHERE inventory_flow_id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inventory_flow_item_units(inventory_flow_id,item_unit_id) SELECT #{flowId},#{unitId} FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM inventory_flow_item_units WHERE inventory_flow_id=#{flowId} AND item_unit_id=#{unitId})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inventory_flow_item_units WHERE inventory_flow_id=#{flowId} AND item_unit_id=#{unitId}
SELECT * FROM inventory_flow_items WHERE inventory_flow_id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT u.* FROM item_units u JOIN inventory_flow_item_units x ON x.item_unit_id=u.id WHERE x.inventory_flow_id=#{id} AND u.deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT * FROM inventory_flows WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE engineering_orders SET leader_user_id=#{leaderUserId},process_id=#{processId},item_id=#{itemId},name=#{name},expected_quantity=#{expectedQuantity},description=#{description},updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND status=1 AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT e.*,i.name item_name,p.name process_name FROM engineering_orders e JOIN items i ON i.id=e.item_id JOIN processes p ON p.id=e.process_id WHERE e.id=#{id} AND e.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT e.*,i.name item_name,p.name process_name FROM engineering_orders e JOIN items i ON i.id=e.item_id JOIN processes p ON p.id=e.process_id WHERE e.deleted_at IS NULL AND e.leader_user_id=#{leaderId}AND e.item_id=#{itemId}AND e.process_id=#{processId}AND e.status=#{status} ORDER BY e.updated_at DESC,e.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE ${table} SET ${statusColumn}=#{next},updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND ${statusColumn}=#{expected} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE ${table} SET deleted_at=NOW(),updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND ${statusColumn}=1 AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE inventory_flows SET flow_status=#{status},approved_by=#{by},approved_at=NOW(),updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND flow_status=2 AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE item_units SET stock_status=#{status},updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE inventory_flow_items SET finished_quantity=(SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT x.item_unit_id) FROM inventory_flow_item_units x JOIN item_units u ON u.id=x.item_unit_id WHERE x.inventory_flow_id=#{id} AND u.item_id=inventory_flow_items.item_id),updated_at=NOW() WHERE inventory_flow_id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE items SET total_count=total_count+1, in_stock_count=in_stock_count+IF(#{stockStatus}=1,1,0), reserved_count=reserved_count+IF(#{stockStatus}=2,1,0), out_stock_count=out_stock_count+IF(#{stockStatus}=3,1,0), pending_count=pending_count+IF(#{qualityStatus}=1,1,0), qualified_count=qualified_count+IF(#{qualityStatus}=2,1,0), unqualified_count=unqualified_count+IF(#{qualityStatus}=3,1,0), available_count=available_count+IF(#{stockStatus}=1 AND #{qualityStatus}=2,1,0), updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE items SET in_stock_count=in_stock_count-IF(#{oldStockStatus}=1,1,0)+IF(#{newStockStatus}=1,1,0), reserved_count=reserved_count-IF(#{oldStockStatus}=2,1,0)+IF(#{newStockStatus}=2,1,0), out_stock_count=out_stock_count-IF(#{oldStockStatus}=3,1,0)+IF(#{newStockStatus}=3,1,0), pending_count=pending_count-IF(#{oldQualityStatus}=1,1,0)+IF(#{newQualityStatus}=1,1,0), qualified_count=qualified_count-IF(#{oldQualityStatus}=2,1,0)+IF(#{newQualityStatus}=2,1,0), unqualified_count=unqualified_count-IF(#{oldQualityStatus}=3,1,0)+IF(#{newQualityStatus}=3,1,0), available_count=available_count-IF(#{oldStockStatus}=1 AND #{oldQualityStatus}=2,1,0)+IF(#{newStockStatus}=1 AND #{newQualityStatus}=2,1,0), updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE engineering_orders SET produced_quantity=produced_quantity+1, qualified_quantity=qualified_quantity+IF(#{qualityStatus}=2,1,0), unqualified_quantity=unqualified_quantity+IF(#{qualityStatus}=3,1,0), updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE engineering_orders SET qualified_quantity=qualified_quantity-IF(#{oldQualityStatus}=2,1,0)+IF(#{newQualityStatus}=2,1,0), unqualified_quantity=unqualified_quantity-IF(#{oldQualityStatus}=3,1,0)+IF(#{newQualityStatus}=3,1,0), updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE items SET available_count=available_count-#{quantity}, reserved_count=reserved_count+#{quantity}, updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND available_count>=#{quantity}

UPDATE items SET in_stock_count=in_stock_count+IF(#{flowType}=1,1,-1), out_stock_count=out_stock_count+IF(#{flowType}=1,-1,1), reserved_count=GREATEST(0,reserved_count-IF(#{flowType}=2,1,0)), available_count=available_count+IF(#{flowType}=1 AND #{qualified},1,0), updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
